$comment: IS-FIXTURES (b) — OUTBOUND CLEAN abstract rule-diff. release-spec roadmap #4 / DD-7(b); original-design-spec §2.6. The GENERALIZABLE form of the SAME improvement as lr-dirty-with-specifics.json, but stripped to the abstract change + rationale: NO brand name, NO partner, NO codename, NO secret, NO snowflake, NO absolute path, NO handle, NO performance numbers tied to the brand. This is the ONLY shape DD-7(2) permits to leave the install (abstract rule-diff structure + rationale). assertShareable MUST ACCEPT it and the sanitizer MUST be a NO-OP on it (idempotence — sanitizing an already-clean payload changes nothing). Refs are generic/relative; the rationale speaks about content types in the abstract ('timely-event content', not the brand). Synthetic. See PROVENANCE.md.
proposed_diff:
--- rules/voice/opener-variety.md
+++ rules/voice/opener-variety.md
@@ generalizable improvement
# When seeding sibling variants, raise the opener-repetition penalty so two variants do
# not share the first sentence. Across a rolling window this improved distinctness of
# timely-event content without tripping the variant-duplication lint or any gate.
-  "opener_repetition_penalty": 0.20,
+  "opener_repetition_penalty": 0.40,
